name: Wilkes Boardinghouse-Style Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450 degrees.
2. Sift the self-rising flour and baking powder into a bowl.
3. Cut in the vegetable shortening and margarine until the mixture resembles coarse cornmeal.
4. Mix in the buttermilk and whole milk, adding water as needed to reach a total of 3/4 cup. Stir until well combined.
5. Form the dough into a ball by mixing with your hands.
6. Turn out onto a lightly floured surface and gently knead for 6-7 times.
7. Pinch off portions of dough to form desired biscuit sizes.
8. Keep fingers dry by dipping into flour as needed.
9. Flatten slightly and place on a greased baking sheet.
10. Bake for 12 to 15 minutes.
